Interface IExecutionMethodReturn

All Superinterfaces:
IExecutionBaseMethodReturn<SourceElement>, IExecutionElement, IExecutionNode<SourceElement>
All Known Implementing Classes:
ExecutionMethodReturn, ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessMethodReturn
public interface IExecutionMethodReturn extends IExecutionBaseMethodReturn<SourceElement>

A node in the symbolic execution tree which represents a method return, e.g. return 42.

The default implementation is ExecutionMethodReturn which is instantiated via a SymbolicExecutionTreeBuilder instance.

See Also:
  • SymbolicExecutionTreeBuilder
  • ExecutionMethodReturn

    • isReturnValuesComputed

      boolean isReturnValuesComputed()
      Checks if the values of getReturnValues() are already computed.
      Returns:
      true value of getReturnValues() are already computed, false values of getReturnValues() needs to be computed.
